notes: The texts are intentionally kept short for mobile app use.
Quran verse and hadith texts are concise meaning-based renderings, not full literal translations.
Source verification and review by a qualified religious editor are recommended before production use.

sabah.text: O Allah, begin my day with goodness, abundance, and well-being.
My Lord, enlighten my heart with your light and adorn my tongue with your remembrance.
Oh my God, guide me to the right today and keep me away from the wrong.
Lord, make my work easier and give peace to my heart.
O Allah, grant me halal sustenance and pure intentions.
Lord, make this day a means of peace for me and my loved ones.
Oh God, open my morning with faith, trust and peace.
My Lord, wake me up from gratitude, not from heedlessness.
Oh God, do not separate my tongue from good words today.
Lord, cleanse my heart from bad thoughts.
“The Morning Qur'an bears witness.”
“Glorify the praise of your Lord before the sunrise.”
“Remember the name of your Lord morning and evening.”
“Hearts find peace only by remembering Allah.”
“Surely, with difficulty comes ease.”
“Whoever puts his trust in Allah, He is sufficient for him.”
“If you are grateful, I will surely increase it for you.”
“Allah is with those who are patient.”
“My Lord, increase my knowledge.”
“Allah wants ease for you, He does not want hardship for you.”
“O Allah, make the work of my ummah early in the morning fruitful.”
"He who performs the morning prayer is under the protection of Allah."
“Whoever performs two coolness prayers will enter heaven.”
“The most beloved deeds to Allah are those that are continuous, even if they are small.”
“Prayer is the essence of worship.”
“Cleanliness is half of faith.”
“Make it easy, don't make it difficult.”
“He who does not show mercy will not be shown mercy.”
"The work of a believer is astonishing; every situation is good for him."
“Whoever causes good deeds will also be rewarded for that good deed.”
Oh God, make today a fruitful beginning.
Lord, give peace to my heart and strength to my body.
Oh my God, guide me to good doors today.
Lord, make my earnings halal and my heart pure.
O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the evil of my soul.
My Lord, compare me with good people today.
O Allah, allow me to be thankful for the blessings upon me.
My Lord, surround my morning with your mercy.
Oh God, protect me from things that will embarrass me.
Lord, help me make wise decisions today.
“He creates the morning.”
“Allah is a protector over everything.”
“Say: My Lord, let me enter with truth and bring me out with truth.”
“Allah loves those who do good.”
“My Lord, make me one of those who perform prayer.”
“We sent you only as a mercy to the worlds.”
“Allah's help is near.”
“Your Lord said, pray to me and I will answer you.”
“Surely Allah commands justice and goodness.”
“A person is only rewarded for what he works for.”

ogle.text: Oh God, renew my heart in the middle of the day and correct my intentions.
Lord, make this time a time of peace and tranquility.
Oh my God, take away my anxiety and give me confidence.
My Lord, make me one of your just and honest servants.
Oh God, turn my effort today into something good.
My Lord, give abundance to my sustenance and wisdom to my words.
Oh God, let me live without breaking or breaking my heart.
Lord, give me gentleness instead of anger.
Oh my God, keep me safe from the rights of people.
Lord, grant me the blessing of prayers that are accepted at this time.
“Perform prayer and give alms.”
“Remember Me and I will remember you.”
“Surely prayer prevents from indecency and evil.”
“Collaborate in goodness and piety.”
“Allah loves those who act justly.”
“Your Lord is the possessor of great mercy.”
"Be patient; surely Allah does not waste the reward of those who do good."
“Every blessing is from Allah.”
“Surely Allah is aware of your deeds.”
“Indeed, Allah does not love those who are wasteful.”
“The most beloved deed in the sight of Allah is prayer performed on time.”
“Make it easy, don't make it difficult; give good news, don't make people hate.”
“A strong person is the one who controls his anger.”
A Muslim is one from whose hand and tongue people are safe.
“As long as Allah helps his servant, the servant helps his brother.”
“Your smile is charity.”
“The best of people is the one who is beneficial to people.”
“The best of affairs is the middle one.”
“Allah is gentle and loves gentleness.”
“No one has ever eaten a morsel better than his own earnings.”
Oh God, protect my heart from heedlessness in the middle of the day.
Lord, grant me halal income and a clean conscience.
Oh God, turn my tiredness today into good deeds.
My Lord, teach me to restrain the greed of my soul.
Oh God, protect me from making hasty judgments.
My Lord, make my tongue steadfast in truth.
Oh God, fill my time with useful things.
Lord, give me peace at this time of the day.
Oh God, grant me the dignity of being a servant.
Lord, grant my heart contentment.
“Allah wishes you ease, not difficulty.”
“Surely Allah is most forgiving, most merciful.”
Speak of your Lord's blessing.
"Good and evil are not the same; repel evil with what is best."
“Allah is with the righteous.”
“Say: Are those who know equal to those who do not know?”
“My Lord, give spaciousness to my chest.”
“A person is only worthy of what he works for.”
“Surely Allah loves those who are patient.”
“The servants of the Most Merciful walk humbly on earth.”

ikindi.text: May God grant us the ability to complete the rest of the day with goodness.
Lord, make my tiredness beautiful with patience.
Oh God, protect my heart from everything that distracts me at this time.
Lord, make my end better than my beginning.
Oh God, keep me away from haste, anger and hurtful words.
Lord, grant me the ability to finish my job with accuracy.
Oh God, forgive me for the mistakes I have made throughout the day.
My Lord, bring peace to my heart as the evening approaches.
Oh God, protect me from waste and extravagance.
Lord, give me clarity of mind and serenity of heart.
Be steadfast in the middle prayer.
For those who do good is the best reward and more.
“Surely Allah is with those who do good.”
“Allah does not burden anyone with more than they can bear.”
“Your Lord is Forgiving and Merciful.”
“Surely Allah is sufficient for those who rely on Him.”
“Then worship Me alone.”
“Your Lord encompasses everything.”
“Allah is with you; He does not diminish your deeds.”
Do not lose heart and do not grieve; if you are believers, you will prevail.
Whoever neglects the Asr prayer, it is as though his deeds were lost.
“Whoever performs two coolness prayers will enter heaven.”
"A believer's work is good; if he is happy, he is thankful; if he is sad, he is patient."
“Allah is beautiful and loves beauty.”
"Do not hold grudges against each other; be brothers."
“Charity does not decrease wealth.”
Keeping family ties brings blessing to life.
Even if the Last Hour comes while you have a sapling in your hand, plant it.
“The best of people are those with the best morals.”
“Allah gives goodness to a servant when he acts gently.”
Oh God, give me the strength to sustain me towards the end of the day.
Lord, give my heart dignity and patience.
O Allah, accept the good deeds I have done today.
My Lord, complete my shortcomings with your mercy.
Oh God, protect me from slips of the tongue and heartbreak.
Lord, give wisdom to my mind and mercy to my heart.
Oh God, forgive anyone I have done wrong today.
Lord, make my remaining time useful.
Oh God, warn me where my soul deceives me.
My Lord, make me one of those who are patient.
“Compete in goodness.”
“Allah rewards those who are patient without measure.”
“Whoever does even an iota of good will see it.”
“Allah will reward those who are grateful.”
“He created for you hearing, sight and hearts.”
“Allah loves those who repent most.”
“Allah is with the pious.”
“My Lord, forgive me and my parents.”
“Surely Allah is the best guardian.”
“Be patient with the judgment of your Lord.”

aksam.text: O Allah, let this evening pass in safety, peace, and well-being.
Lord, allow us to account for the day with goodness.
Oh my God, erase the tiredness in my heart with your mercy.
My Lord, make my evening beautiful with your remembrance.
Oh God, give peace to my family and abundance to my home.
Lord, forgive me for the mistakes I have made during the day.
Oh God, give my night peace, not fear.
Lord, protect us with your light even in the dark.
Oh God, make this evening a door of goodness.
Lord, protect my loved ones from visible and invisible evil.
“Glorify Allah when you enter the evening.”
“He made the night a garment for you.”
“Pray at both ends of the day and at the close hours of the night.”
Surely your Lord's grasp is severe.
“Allah is the light of the heavens and the earth.”
“It is He who created the night so that you may rest.”
“Say: My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the temptations of the devils.”
“My Lord, bring me down to a blessed place.”
“Surely Allah is sufficient as a protector.”
“He is very compassionate and merciful towards his servants.”
“When evening comes, take your children with you, because that's when the devils spread.”
“Whoever makes the evening dhikr will be protected.”
“O Allah, we entered the evening in your name.”
“If a person goes to bed with ablution, the angel prays for him.”
“The Most Merciful has mercy on those who show mercy.”
"When a believer prays for his brother in his absence, the angel says 'amen'."
"Whoever relieves a Muslim's troubles, Allah will relieve his troubles."
"The repentance of those who repent before nightfall will be accepted."
“Spread the greetings.”
“Allah establishes those who believe with the firm word.”
O Allah, accept the good deeds I have done today.
Lord, fill my evening with peace, not regret.
My God, give my heart the serenity that suits the night.
My Lord, protect me from all evil, secretly and openly.
O Allah, make my home a place of mercy, love and safety.
Lord, draw my heart closer to You this evening.
O Allah, correct my world and my afterlife.
Lord, increase my awareness of the blessings given to me today.
O Allah, make me love forgiveness and gentleness.
My Lord, send down tranquility upon me in the evening.
“Praise the name of your Lord evening and morning.”
“Prostrate yourself at night and glorify Him at length.”
"Undoubtedly, night worship is more effective and more reliable in terms of recitation."
“Allah has set a measure for everything.”
“Do not despair of the mercy of your Lord.”
“Allah is the best protector.”
He is the One who made the night for your rest.
“The eyes cannot perceive Him; He perceives the eyes.”
"Allah is sufficient for you; what a wonderful guardian He is."
“He who trusts in me will not go to waste.”

yatsi.text: Oh God, make my night peaceful and my sleep rest.
Lord, protect my heart with your light even in the darkness of the night.
Oh my God, make me safe from fears and make my heart calm.
Lord, forgive my flaws today and wake me up better tomorrow.
O Allah, make my bed a means of rest and healing.
Lord, make the night a time of contemplation and peace for me.
Oh God, cleanse my heart from grudge and resentment.
My Lord, make me one of your forgiven servants.
Oh God, give peace to my soul and rest to my body.
Lord, protect my night from the whispers of the devil.
“Prostrate yourself before Him at night and glorify Him throughout the long night.”
“Prostrate yourself to Him during part of the night.”
“They spend the nights prostrating and standing before their Lord.”
Indeed, rising by night is more effective.
“Do not despair of the mercy of your Lord.”
“Allah is closer to you than your jugular vein.”
“He takes lives during sleep.”
“My Lord, forgive me, forgive my parents and the believers.”
“Allah is gracious to His servants.”
“Surely Allah has power over everything.”
“Whoever performs the Isha and Fajr prayers in congregation is as if he spent the night in worship.”
“If you recite Ayat al-Kursi while going to bed, a protector will be appointed by Allah.”
“When the Messenger of Allah went to bed, he would read the surahs of Ikhlas, Falaq and An-Nas.”
When you go to bed, lie on your right side and make dua.
“O Allah, I die and come to life in your name.”
Whoever sleeps in a state of ablution, an angel prays for him through the night.
"The best of people is the one who learns and teaches the Quran."
“There is an hour in the night when prayer is not rejected.”
O people, pray at night while others sleep; you will enter Paradise in peace.
A servant is nearest to his Lord while in prostration.
Oh God, let me sleep tonight forgiven.
Lord, clean up the mess in my heart.
Oh God, make my night based on trust, not fear.
My Lord, forgive me and those who oppressed me today.
Oh God, make the night healing for my soul.
My Lord, make me sleep with a pure intention and a light heart.
O Allah, I seek refuge in You from bad dreams.
Lord, make my sleep peaceful after worship.
Oh my God, lift me up with hope for tomorrow.
Lord, make my night fruitful and my morning bright.
“He created the night so that you may find peace.”
“Your Lord is the one who knows the changes of night and day.”
“Surely Allah loves those who repent.”
“Your Lord is the possessor of infinite forgiveness.”
“He answers the prayer of the one who prays.”
“Whoever turns to Allah will be guided to the right path.”
“Allah's mercy is close to the good people.”
“There are signs in the night and the day for those with understanding.”
“Surely my Lord is close to me and hears prayers.”
“The word of peace is given to them as a word from the most merciful Lord.”
